title: My Small Garden
content: Behind Olivia’s apartment, there was a very small garden with flowers and herbs. Every evening, she spent a few minutes watering the plants and removing dry leaves. She grew tomatoes, mint, and colorful flowers in old pots near the fence. Gardening helped Olivia relax after busy days at work. Sometimes neighbors stopped to admire the plants and ask questions about them. One morning, she noticed the first small tomato growing on the vine. That tiny detail made her surprisingly happy for the rest of the day.
